name: Calendly
description: Monitor Calendly scheduling platform for team access and meeting link security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Calendly at https://calendly.com
2. Go to Integrations → API & Webhooks
3. Generate a Personal Access Token
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Calendly Integrations → API & Webhooks

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Calendly organization members and their scheduling access

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Calendly scheduling service is active
